name: panic-font
description: Burnthday's Widespread Panic Spread Sheet static site.

scripts.refresh:setlists: npm run import:official-setlists && npm run enrich:setlist-transitions
scripts.refresh:strict: npm run import:playstats && npm run import:official-setlists && npm run enrich:setlist-transitions -- --require-all && npm run import:ec-prior-stats -- --require-all && npm run verify
scripts.postshow: npm run refresh:setlists && npm run import:ec-prior-stats -- --allow-ec-lag && npm run verify
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run validate:playstats && npm run validate:tour-data
scripts.qa: npm run verify && node scripts/qa-site.mjs && npm run validate:production
scripts.dev: npm run build && npx serve dist
scripts.deploy: npm run verify && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name burnthday
